topMismatches: Nav height 73 vs 87 (14px taller in sandbox)
Real bg transparent (page is white anyway), sandbox solid white sticky
Logo: real italic hand-drawn 'indeed' with animated dotted loop; sandbox flat bold sans-serif 'indeed' blue (rgb(45,45,45) text wrapper)
Nav items: real shows Home/Company reviews/Find salaries (3 left items); sandbox adds Employers/Create your resume (5 left items)
Sandbox has 'Change country 🇺🇸 United States' on right; real has no country switcher
Real has 'Sign in' as blue link + 'Employers / Post Job' on far right; sandbox 'Sign in | Employers / Post Job' separated by |
Search inputs: real 304x60 pill (12px radius, prominent shadow); sandbox 598x42 flat with no radius — sandbox is wider but flatter
Search button bg color: real rgb(0,79,203) sandbox rgb(37,87,167) — different shade of Indeed blue
Search button radius: real 12px (pill) sandbox 4px (rounded square)
Inputs lack icon glyphs in sandbox; real has magnifier (left of What) + location pin (left of Where)
Search button at x=1103 (real, centered with bar) vs x=1352 (sandbox, far right)
Chip radius: real 159984px (fully rounded pill, max-content) vs sandbox 4-8px rounded square
Real chips wrap to 2 rows (8 chips row 1, 3 chips row 2); sandbox renders all 11 in single row at narrower scale
Real chip text: 12px medium (500); sandbox 14px medium — sandbox visually larger
Real 'Distance' chip has selected state with count badge '1'; sandbox shows uniform unselected pills
Real chip height 44px; sandbox ~28px — sandbox chips visually smaller

Card width close (470 vs 480) but content composition differs significantly

Sandbox card: title + company + ★ rating + (review count) + city + salary + snippet + 'Just posted' / 'Posted N days ago' + bookmark right

Real x=180 (results column anchored further right with rail); sandbox x=60 (results column flush left)
Pane width nearly identical (682 vs 680) — good
Pane radius: real 20px (large rounded card) vs sandbox 8px (small radius)
